name: Wheelchair Transport Svc
principals: George B. Williams Sr. (founder); Bud Williams (VP Operations/Partner, 2nd generation)
districts_or_customers: Florida West Coast (Pinellas/Tampa Bay); Optum/Evercare, VA benefits, private pay
recent_news: Bud Williams named TLPA National Paratransit Operator of the Year (2013); company marketed 50+ years of operation on FL West Coast as of recent website copy.
fit_notes: NEMT/paratransit operator, not a school-bus contractor; only fits Summit if platform pursues special-needs/SPED-adjacent NEMT bolt-on. Otherwise out of scope.

name: H & L Bloom
owner_or_parent: independent (Bloom family); operates as H & L Bloom, Inc. and sister Bloom's Bus Lines, Inc.
principals: Harry & Lillian Bloom (founders, 1946); Mark Bloom (President per source data)
districts_or_customers: Taunton Public Schools and surrounding SE Massachusetts districts; Attleboro contract historically; Boston commuter routes from Taunton/Raynham/West Bridgewater
recent_news: No M&A found; long-running Taunton-area school contract; Attleboro school bus contract awarded historically to H&L Bloom. No Beacon Mobility/PE acquisition confirmed as of latest searches.
fit_notes: Strong independent family-owned MA platform with ~200 vehicles spanning school + motorcoach. 80-year-old, multi-generational ownership = textbook Summit tuck-in profile in Massachusetts.

name: KBR Inc Which Will Do Bus
districts_or_customers: unknown; not found on Rochester City SD, Brighton CSD, or NYSDOT bus operator listings
recent_news: None found. Domain 'kbr.co' in source data resolves to KBR Inc, the SEC-registered engineering/government services giant (NYSE: KBR), which is NOT this entity. kbr-trans.com is a separate Illinois trucking company. No school-bus operator named 'KBR Inc' surfaces in BBB, D&B, or NYSDOT operator profiles for Monroe County.
fit_notes: Cannot confirm as an active independent school-bus operator. Source record entity name ('KBR Inc Which Will Do Bus') and unverifiable website suggest data quality issue. Recommend dropping or re-sourcing via NY Sec of State / NYSDOT before outreach.

name: Eagle Bus Svc
districts_or_customers: Charlotte-area charter and private schools throughout Mecklenburg County; Movement School and Metrolina Regional Scholars' Academy referenced; uses cluster-stop model with GPS
recent_news: No M&A activity found. Operating since 2009 serving Charlotte charter/private school market; profiled by Charlotte Business Resources #31DaysofBiz.
fit_notes: Small, founder-led Charlotte charter/private school niche operator with ~15+ years of operating history. Modest scale but a clean independent tuck-in candidate for Summit's NC footprint; succession signal lower (founder still relatively young, no public sale signals).

name: Nelson Transportation Inc
districts_or_customers: unknown; no presence on Victor Valley UHSD, Victor ESD, or VVTA contractor lists
recent_news: No news located. Address (11625 Beachcomber Ln, Victorville) is a residential street; listed website (freelaptopreward.com) is an unrelated/parked-style domain; phone listed 'Not Available'. CHP/CPUC carrier records do not surface this entity for school-bus service.
fit_notes: Multiple red flags: residential address, unrelated/garbage website domain, no phone, not appearing in CA school-bus operator records. Likely data-quality artifact or defunct shell, not a viable independent school-bus tuck-in. Recommend deprioritize/drop without further validation via CA SOS + CHP records.
